questions.question: How does the lesson split the 2026 LLM observability market?
options: Development platforms (bundled with evals/prompts/sessions) versus gateway/telemetry tools
questions.question_zh: 本课如何划分 2026 年的 LLM 可观测性市场？
options_zh: 开发平台（捆绑 eval/prompt/session）vs 网关/遥测工具

questions.question: Which tool does the lesson position as MIT-licensed core with strong self-host story and 50K events/month free cloud tier?
questions.question_zh: 本课把哪个工具定位为 MIT 许可的核心、有强自托管故事且免费云层提供 5 万事件/月？

questions.question: What is Arize AX's main scale claim relative to monolithic observability stacks like Datadog?
options: Roughly 100x cheaper at scale via zero-copy Iceberg/Parquet integration
questions.question_zh: Arize AX 相对 Datadog 这种一体化可观测性栈的主要规模卖点是什么？
options_zh: 在大规模场景下大约便宜 100 倍，依赖零拷贝的 Iceberg/Parquet 集成

questions.question: What does the lesson call the wrong instrumentation layer for portability?
options: Instrumenting inside your agent framework, since it couples you to that framework
questions.question_zh: 本课认为对可移植性而言，错误的埋点层是哪个？
options_zh: 在 agent 框架内部埋点，因为这把你绑死在该框架上
对成功请求按 5% 采样
使用 OpenTelemetry GenAI 语义约定

questions.question: Which OpenTelemetry conventions does the lesson identify as the 2026 interop layer between observability tools?
questions.question_zh: 本课认为 2026 年作为可观测性工具间互操作层的是哪套 OpenTelemetry 约定？

questions.question: Why does the lesson argue full-trace retention does not scale past 1M requests/day?
options: Retention storage costs more than the LLM calls themselves; teams must sample (e.g. 100% errors, 100% high-cost, 5% successes)
questions.question_zh: 本课为什么认为日请求量超过 100 万就无法做全 trace 留存？
options_zh: 留存存储比 LLM 调用本身还贵；团队必须采样（例如错误 100%、高成本 100%、成功 5%）
OpenTelemetry 限制 trace 体量
Phoenix 只支持 100 万 trace
